title: Cognitive Workload 8-level arithmetic
description: This dataset comprises multimodal neurophysiological recordings from 18 participants performing an 8-level arithmetic task with systematically varied cognitive workload. The dataset includes 19-channel EEG, 3-lead ECG, and pupillometry data synchronized via Lab Streaming Layer, with task events encoded by difficulty level. Raw data were converted from Lab Streaming Layer/XDF format to BIDS-compliant BrainVision format, providing a resource for investigating neural and physiological correlates of cognitive workload during arithmetic problem-solving.
methods_description: EEG was recorded from 19 channels in a 10-20 montage (250 Hz sampling rate) using Ag/AgCl electrodes with linked-ear reference on a mobile EEG system. ECG was captured with 3-lead configuration on the same system. Pupil Labs Pupil Core eye tracking with infrared illuminators was synchronized via Lab Streaming Layer. Participants completed a baseline period (60 seconds) followed by 70 arithmetic questions (10 at each of 7 difficulty levels), each presented for 6 seconds. Task difficulty was defined using Q-value ranges and randomized across trials.
